title: GraphRAG
task: question answering over private text corpora

defines.name: GraphRAG
defines.definition: A graph-based retrieval-augmented generation framework that enables global question answering over large private text corpora by organizing corpus content into a knowledge graph and community summaries.

problem: Conventional vector RAG cannot answer global sensemaking questions over large corpora, and prior query-focused summarization methods do not scale to RAG-sized collections.
